function.name: sonia_build_agent_dispatch
function.description: Terminal-less build orchestrator. Submits structured compilation or schema generation intents to the Sonia daemon. NEVER invoke raw shell commands.

method.description: Target operation. cargo_check for fast diagnostics, cargo_build for release, generate_schemas for contract updates.

output_dir.description: Only for generate_schemas: where to write .schema.json files

priority.description: Execution priority. Use 'blocking' only for critical path validations.

intent_id.description: UUID for correlating request/response in AI context.
